description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the nixos/nix:2.3 Docker image and runs a before_script that adds the nixpkgs channel from https://nixos.org/channels/nixos-19.09, updates channels, creates ~/.config/nixpkgs, and copies the repository into that directory. Define a single build stage and a user-environment job in that stage that executes nix-env -i user-environment. Set the GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variable to recursive. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are needed.
